name: ExtensionTransport_Restriction
title: R5: Constraints on fulfillment transports (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Transport.restriction` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Transport.restriction` 0..1 `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `Transport.restriction` 0..1 `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Transport.restriction` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.restriction` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Indicates the number of times the requested action should occur.

element.comment:

Note that period.high is the due date representing the time by which the transport should be completed.
